gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/50)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/50)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ لِي عَلَى رَجُلٍ دَيْناً وَ قَدْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَبِيعَ دَارَهُ فَيَقْضِيَنِي قَالَ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أُعِيذُكَ بِاللَّهِ أَنْ تُخْرِجَهُ مِنْ ظِلِّ رَأْسِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibrahim Bin Abdul Hameed, from Usman Bin Ziyad who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘There is a debt for me upon a man and he intends to sell his house, so he can pay me’. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> seek Refuge for you with Allah<sup>azwj</sup> that you should take him out from the shade of his head’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan all ibn abu ‘Umayr from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Flamid from ‘Uthman ibn Ziyad who has said the following: “Once I said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that a man owes me a certain amount and wants to sell his house to pay me. Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘I seek protection for you with Allah against taking him out of the shadow on his head.’”
